translations.### Bye Bye 2020 經營 Medium 第二年回顧\n\n: ### Bye Bye 2020 Reviewing the Second Year of Managing Medium
translations.#### 寫文章用到的 Chrome Extension\n\n: #### Chrome Extensions Used for Writing Articles
translations.**再推一次 [Code Medium](https://chrome.goog: **Recommending [Code Medium](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/code-medium/dganoageikmadjocbmklfgaejpkdigbe){:target="_blank"} again** — it allows you to paste beautiful code snippets using Gist directly within Medium!
translations.*- Medium 內建的程式碼區塊到現在都還不支援彩色高亮顯示，所以只能這樣。: *- Medium's built-in code blocks still do not support syntax highlighting, so this is the best option for now.*
translations.*- 試過很多轉換工具都不支援 gist 擷取，如果有朋友知道懇請補充。*\n\: *- Tried many conversion tools but none support gist extraction. If anyone knows, please share.*
translations.*2020 一樣感謝大家的支持與愛護，今年也會繼續加油的！*\n\n: *Thank you all for your support and care in 2020. I will continue to work hard this year!*
translations.*Medium 官方的備份下載只有備份純文字，圖片都還是外連沒有下載回來；更何況: *The official Medium backup only saves plain text; images remain externally linked and are not downloaded. Moreover, code sections are embedded and cannot be directly displayed in Markdown.*
translations.*你的回饋就是我寫作的原動力！*\n\n: *Your feedback is the driving force behind my writing!*
translations.- **Recommending [Code Medium](https://c: - **Recommending [Code Medium](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/code-medium/dganoageikmadjocbmklfgaejpkdigbe){:target="_blank"} again** — it lets you paste beautiful code snippets using Gist directly on Medium!

translations.- Total article views: **180,000** (2x g:
- Total article views: **180,000** (2x growth)

- Total claps for all articles: **11,000** (doubled)

- Followers: Surpassed 400 (doubled growth)

In 2020, a total of:  
**16** articles were published: **3** lifestyle + **2** unboxing + **11** technical articles

translations.人，要學會珍惜當下、珍惜自己所擁有的。\n\n: People need to learn to cherish the present and appreciate what they have.
translations.但發現會影響 Google SEO，還在考慮＆測試要不要真的使用。\n\n: However, I found that it affects Google SEO, so I am still considering and testing whether to actually use it.
translations.使用 gist 嵌入程式碼的好處是，支援彩色高亮，方便讀者閱讀；壞處是如果想把: The advantage of using gist to embed code is that it supports syntax highlighting, making it easier for readers to read; the downside is that when converting Medium posts to markdown format, the embedded code cannot be automatically converted and must be manually copied and pasted.
translations.反正我很閒\n\n: Anyway, I have a lot of free time.
translations.另外去年也用 Google site 把個人網站弄起來了；並持續會把 Mediu: Also, last year I set up my personal website using Google Sites and continue to sync new Medium article updates there.
translations.另外還有統計新增的追蹤者、拍手…等等功能。\n\n: There are also features for tracking new followers, claps, and more.
translations.回到工作上，2020 突破舒適圈進入新的環境；讓我接觸到許多新鮮事，吸收了很多: Back to work, in 2020 I stepped out of my comfort zone into a new environment; this exposed me to many new things and allowed me to absorb a lot of valuable knowledge in iOS and engineering development. Although I published fewer articles in 2020 and even stopped updating for three to four months, I focused on quality over quantity. The articles I wrote in 2020 were fewer but performed better than before; I am gradually improving!
translations.安裝好之後，在 Medium 上點「+」然後選最後一個「<>」\n\n: After installation, click the "+" on Medium and then select the last option "<>".
translations.已經部署上去了，請參考「 [Medium 自訂網域功能回歸](../d9a95d: It has been deployed. Please refer to "[Medium Custom Domain Feature Returns](../d9a95d4224ea/)".
translations.我只想說一句：\n\n: I just want to say one thing:
translations.我還是那個我，我是很懶的人；不會為了寫文章而寫，每篇文章都是自己醞釀了些心得然後: I am still the same person—I’m quite lazy; I don’t write articles just for the sake of writing. Each article comes from some insights I’ve developed and then immediately jot down. If I get lazy and don’t do it all at once, I probably won’t bother going back to write it later (though this usually happens only with unimportant or uninteresting topics).
translations.最近也開通了以下服務：\n\n: Recently, I have also launched the following services:
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.每日流量聚合顯示，一眼就能看出今天的流量文章組成。\n\n: Daily traffic aggregation display lets you see today's traffic composition at a glance.
translations.無關工作，2020 對我來說是艱難的一年；經歷了許多重大挫折，不過還好，都挺過去: Unrelated to work, 2020 was a tough year for me; I went through many significant setbacks, but fortunately, I got through them.
translations.目前進度大約完成 15%，因為很無聊所以有點懶 哈哈。\n\n: Currently about 15% complete. Feeling a bit lazy because it's boring, haha.
translations.缺點就是有時候一頭熱，寫太快，打錯字是小如果內容有錯或不夠完整誤導大家真是罪孽: The downside is that sometimes I get too eager and write too fast. Typos are minor, but if the content is wrong or incomplete and misleads readers, that's a serious fault Orz. So this year, when writing articles, I research and address all the issues I can think of and handle, even if they weren't used in my original project. If I can't solve them, I leave a note to remind readers to pay attention to that aspect.
translations.送出之後就會直接以 gist 嵌入 Medium 文章中：\n\n: After submission, it will be directly embedded in the Medium article as a gist:
translations.這時畫面會分為左右，可以直接在右方輸入程式碼：\n\n: The screen will split into left and right sections, allowing you to enter code directly on the right side:
translations.除了繼續寫作外；預計會找個時間把每篇文章都翻成 Markdown 版本並上傳到: Besides continuing to write, I plan to find time to convert each article into Markdown format and upload them to Github for backup, in case Medium suddenly crashes one day... Currently, I use the [Typora](http://typora.io/){:target="_blank"} editor; it’s quite user-friendly. I will introduce it in detail later!
